features.label: Fully Redesigned Error Pages
features.desc: All error pages (No Internet, DNS Error, SSL Error, Timeout, Not Found, Redirect Loop) have been completely redesigned with a clean, professional two-column layout — icon on the left, content on the right.
features.howto: Trigger any network error (e.g. visit a fake domain) to see the new error page.

features.label: Full-screen 3D Background
features.desc: Each error type now has a unique subtle 3D background animation using Three.js — particles, wireframe shapes, and slow rotations. Canvas fills the entire viewport as a background layer.

features.label: Glassmorphism Layout replaced with Clean Side-by-Side Design
features.desc: Previous heavy glassmorphism card replaced with a minimal two-column layout. Icon box on the left with accent color tint, text content on the right — similar to Chrome/Arc error pages but with a dark theme.

features.label: Per-scene Accent Colors
features.desc: Each error type has its own accent color — teal for No Internet, purple for DNS, red for SSL, amber for Timeout, indigo for Not Found, yellow for Redirect Loop. Colors applied to icon, dots, badge, and primary button.

features.label: Monospace Error Code Badge
features.desc: Error code (e.g. ERR -105) shown in a styled monospace badge below the icon for quick identification.

features.label: Staggered Entry Animations
features.desc: Title, subtitle, tips, and buttons each animate in with a staggered slide-up — fast and clean at 0.35s, not flashy.

features.label: Responsive Layout
features.desc: On narrow viewports the layout stacks vertically — icon and badge on top, content below.
